meta.title: PV Collection
meta.description: A personal coin and currency collection spanning the world

items.title: 1 Rupee — Rhinoceros
items.description: Commemorative Indian one rupee coin featuring the Indian one-horned rhinoceros, issued in celebration of wildlife conservation.

items.title: 1 Dollar — Mob of Kangaroos
items.description: The iconic Australian dollar coin featuring a mob of five kangaroos in motion. First year of issue for the Australian dollar coin.

items.title: 1 Dollar — Kiwi
items.description: New Zealand one dollar coin featuring the iconic Kiwi bird, the national symbol of New Zealand. Commemorating 150 years of New Zealand.

items.title: 25 Cents — California Ocean
items.description: California state quarter featuring the naturalist John Muir, Yosemite Valley, and the California Condor soaring above the Pacific coastline.

items.title: 5 Rupees — Republic India
items.description: Indian five rupee stainless steel coin from the post-liberalization era featuring the Lion Capital of Ashoka on the obverse.

items.title: 50 Pence — London Olympics
items.description: Commemorative 50 pence coin celebrating the London 2012 Olympic Games. Features an abstract athletics design inspired by Olympic movement.

items.title: 5 Rand — Big Five
items.description: South African five rand coin featuring the African Buffalo (Cape Buffalo), one of the famous Big Five animals of Africa.

items.title: 500 Yen — Mandarin Duck
items.description: New-generation Japanese 500 yen bi-colour clad coin featuring advanced clad-core and micro-letter edge inscription anti-counterfeiting measures.

items.title: 10 Rupees — King George VI
items.description: British India ten rupee banknote bearing the portrait of King George VI. Issued by the Reserve Bank of India during the colonial period.

items.title: 1 Dollar — Silver Certificate
items.description: United States one dollar Silver Certificate (Series 1957). Features the portrait of George Washington. Redeemable in silver on demand at the U.S. Treasury.

items.title: 10 Reais — Scarlet Macaw
items.description: Brazilian ten real banknote from the second family series. The reverse features the majestic Scarlet Macaw (Arara Vermelha), symbolizing Brazil's rich biodiversity.

items.title: 5 Pounds — Elizabeth II
items.description: Bank of England five pound note, Series C, featuring Queen Elizabeth II. A classic and highly collectible pre-decimal era British banknote.

items.title: 5 Dollars — Parliament House
items.description: Australian five dollar polymer banknote (Next Generation Banknote series) featuring Parliament House in Canberra with an innovative transparent window and colour-shifting ink.

items.title: 10 Dollars — Viola Desmond
items.description: Canadian ten dollar polymer note honouring Viola Desmond, a Black Nova Scotian businesswoman who challenged racial segregation in 1946.

items.title: 5 Dollars — Kiwi & Hoiho
items.description: New Zealand five dollar polymer note featuring the Brown Kiwi on the obverse and the Yellow-eyed Penguin (Hoiho) on the reverse. Both are iconic endangered birds of NZ.

items.title: Denarius — Julius Caesar
items.description: A silver denarius of Julius Caesar, minted shortly before his assassination. One side features the Venus Genetrix, and the other shows an elephant trampling a serpent.

items.title: 50 Ringgit — MEASAT-3
items.description: 50 Ringgit note commemorating Malaysia's 50th year of Independence, featuring the MEASAT-3 satellite and Tunku Abdul Rahman.

items.title: 10 Francs — Landwasser Viaduct
items.description: Swiss 10 Franc note from the 9th series. The reverse features a railway track passing over the Landwasser Viaduct, symbolizing Swiss precision and punctuality.

items.title: 50 Euro — Gustav Klimt
items.description: Austrian collector coin from the 'Klimt and his Women' series. This coin features the famous 'The Kiss' painting by Gustav Klimt.

items.title: 500,000 Dong — Lotus Flower
items.description: The highest denomination note of Vietnam. The reverse features the Lotus flower, the national flower of Vietnam, representing purity and commitment.

items.title: 100 Euro — Albert Einstein
items.description: German commemorative gold coin for the Einstein Year, marking the centenary of Einstein's 'Annus Mirabilis' and the discovery of the theory of relativity.

items.title: 2000 Rupees — Mangalyaan
items.description: High-denomination pink banknote featuring Mangalyaan (Mars Orbiter Mission), representing India's scientific achievement in space exploration.

items.title: 10 Rupees — Bimetallic
items.description: Indian 10 rupee bimetallic coin prominently featuring 15 rays, part of the early series of high-denomination circulation coins.

items.title: 100 Rupees — Rani ki Vav
items.description: Lavender 100 rupee banknote featuring Rani ki Vav (Queen's Stepwell), a UNESCO World Heritage site in Gujarat, representing historical heritage.

items.title: 10 Rupees — Black Boat (Fafda Note)
items.description: Vintage Indian 10 rupee banknote featuring a dhow (sailing boat) on the reverse. Known colloquially as the 'Fafda Note' for its distinctive dark colour. Issued by the Reserve Bank of India during the post-independence era.

items.title: 2000 Rupees — Mangalyaan (Pink Note)
items.description: The iconic pink 2000 rupee banknote introduced during India's demonetisation in 2016. The reverse features the Mangalyaan (Mars Orbiter Mission), celebrating India's space achievements.
